task_completion.description: Verify that the patient's vitals and diabetic measurements are recorded.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for measurement entries in the patient's eChart or measurement modules showing BP 142/88, HR 78, Weight 81.2, Height 163, HbA1c 8.1, and Fasting Blood Glucose (FBS) 9.2.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Glyburide 5mg prescription has been discontinued.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the medication list in the eChart or Rx module. Glyburide 5mg should be marked as discontinued, archived, or no longer appear in the 'Active' medications list.

task_completion.description: Verify that a new prescription for Sitagliptin 100mg was created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for Sitagliptin 100mg (or Januvia) in the active medications or prescription screen with instructions for 1 tablet daily, quantity 90, and 3 repeats.

task_completion.description: Verify that an allergy to Sulfonamides is documented.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Sulfonamides' in the allergy list or module, with the reaction noted as 'Skin rash and hives' and severity marked as 'Moderate'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the specific encounter note was written and saved in the patient's chart.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an encounter note in the eChart containing the text: 'Annual diabetic review. HbA1c elevated at 8.1%. Discontinuing Glyburide due to recurrent hypoglycemia, replacing with Sitagliptin 100mg daily. New sulfonamide allergy documented. Counseled on diet and exercise. Follow-up in 3 months.'

task_completion.description: Verify that a tickler was created for a 90-day follow-up.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a tickler/reminder assigned to the user, with a due date approximately 90 days from the current date, containing the message: 'Diabetes follow-up — repeat HbA1c and fasting glucose, assess Sitagliptin efficacy.'

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the OSCAR EMR web interface rather than using terminal commands or direct database queries.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the OSCAR EMR web interface in a browser, with visible clicks, typing, or navigation, not a terminal window executing SQL or curl commands.

integrity.description: The agent entered the data into the appropriate EMR modules rather than typing a summary into a single text box or external editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the specific OSCAR modules (eChart, Rx, Allergy, Tickler, Measurements) being used appropriately.

integrity.description: The agent performed the actions in the chart of the correct patient.
integrity.visual_evidence: The patient name 'Fatima Al-Hassan' or demographic number '7' must be visible in the header or context of the screens where actions are performed.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient: Fatima Al-Hassan, DOB: 1978-08-09, Demographic No: 7. Initial state: 4 active medications (Metformin, Glyburide, Ramipril, Atorvastatin), 1 allergy (Penicillin). Measurements to look for: BP (142/88), HR/PULSE (78), WT (81.2), HT (163), HbA1c/A1C (8.1), FBS (9.2). Discontinuing Glyburide means it should be archived/removed from active meds. Sitagliptin may also be listed under its brand name, Januvia. Tickler should be set for ~90 days from the current date.
